event: Riverhounds defeated Loudoun United FC 2-0 in USL Cup group-stage finale, completing group play undefeated in regulation (2-0-2 record in Group 6).
Loudoun United FC fell 2-0 to Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC in USL Cup group-stage finale.
Lexington SC eliminated from the Prinx Tires USL Cup following a loss to Louisville City FC in group-stage play.
Louisville City FC defeated Lexington SC in USL Cup group play, eliminating Lexington from the tournament.
Detroit City FC earned a road win at Fort Wayne FC in USL Cup action; Fort Wayne's USL Cup record drops to 0-3-1.
Detroit City FC earned a road win at Fort Wayne FC in USL Cup action per club page headline.
Fort Wayne FC's 11-match unbeaten streak in USL League One regular-season play has pushed them into the top four of the table.
Fort Wayne FC announced a multiyear naming rights partnership with Ruoff Mortgage for their soccer-specific venue in development.
Union Omaha leads USL League One standings with 30+ points, one point ahead of second-place One Knoxville SC at the league's halfway mark.
One Knoxville SC sits in second place in USL League One, one point behind Union Omaha, with a road undefeated streak approaching a league record.
Charlotte Independence's winning streak ended at eight matches following a result against One Knoxville SC.
Lionsbridge FC finished the Chesapeake Division regular season in first place with 34 points and a +32 goal differential across 14 games, and will host Eastern Conference Quarterfinals on July 17.
Vermont Green FC, defending USL League Two champions, will host Eastern Conference Quarterfinals on July 17 as a top seed in the Eastern Conference.
North Carolina FC suspended operations and filed an application to join USL Premier (targeting 2028 launch), contingent on securing a minimum 15,000-seat purpose-built stadium in Raleigh.
Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC applied to join USL Premier (2028), with a proposed $125M expansion of F.N.B. Stadium to meet the 15,000-seat minimum requirement as the centerpiece of the bid.
Louisville City FC applied to join USL Premier (2028) and currently meets the stadium capacity requirement per league standards.
Sporting Club Jacksonville submitted an application to join USL Premier (2028), though their stadium does not yet meet the capacity requirement.
Charleston Battery midfielder named USL Championship Player of the Month for June after recording five goal contributions over four league outings in an undefeated month.
Adrien Pérez named USL Championship Player of the Week (Week 17) after a two-goal, one-assist display against Phoenix Rising FC.
